sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 43 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.44/2018 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2026 Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel, question before the court is covered against the applicant by virtue of judgment of honourable Supreme Court in the case of Workers Welfare Fund vs. East Pakistan Chrome Tannery (Pvt.) Limited reported as 2017 PLD SC 28. In view hereof, learned counsel states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
